component-based-security/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to align with the new JDK version.
component-based-security/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 language features and bytecode, preventing the use of Java 21 APIs and features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if the application server or dependencies require Java 21.

component-based-security/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 16+ serialization rules.
component-based-security/src/main/java/c.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID must be annotated with @Serial in Java 16+.
